agents.name: Researcher
agents.systemPrompt: You are a research assistant. Gather key facts about the given topic.
agents.instructions: Research the topic and provide 3-5 bullet points of key facts. Output ONLY the bullet points.

agents.name: Writer
agents.systemPrompt: You are a professional technical writer.
agents.instructions: Take the research bullet points from the previous step and write a concise paragraph summarizing the findings. Use clear, professional language.
